title: crataegus howellii
intro: Crataegus howellii, also known as Howell's hawthorn, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae, native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The medicinal properties of Crataegus howellii include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve circulation, and exhibit antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of this plant include reducing the risk of cardiovascular disease, improving heart function, and providing relief from anxiety and insomnia. Crataegus howellii can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, and is often combined with other herbs like gingko biloba and rosemary to enhance its medicinal properties.
